title: FUGUEの実装を確認し、Kernelとの差分を埋めて。ただしFUGUE/kernel両方の既存のシステムを損壊しないように慎重に実装をマルチエージェントで進めて。
summary_text: `run-local-orchestration` is already producing bounded `kernel-context-reference.json`, but only local `attach-context` execution is supported (`scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:1125-1138`), so the bounded context is not actually transported through workflow/handoff dispatch (`route-task-handoff` → `kernel-handoff` → `fugue-tutti-caller`). **Safest next change**: thread a workflow-carried context-reference payload, not a local filesystem path, through the handoff chain and attach it only on the receiving runner before Kernel work starts. Concretely: - Add a new optional dispatch field e.g. `kernel_context_reference_payload_b64` in `[fugue-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-caller.yml):14-18,65-77`, pass it via `[fugue-task-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-task-router.yml):10-15,84-360`, and forward to `[route-task-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh):33-40,530-603`. - Extend `[kernel-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/kernel-handoff.sh)` (and keep a harmless pass-through arg in `[fugue-bridge-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/fugue-bridge-handoff.sh)` for symmetry) to include that payload in the `fugue-tutti-caller` dispatch inputs. - In `[fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml):12-16,315-335,790` add decode-to-temp-file + guarded `codex-kernel-guard attach-context "${KERNEL_RUN_ID}"` step (kernel handoff only). **Key risk:** if path-based reference were passed through dispatch unchanged, it would be invalid/nonportable and injective; the safest semantics are “payload-only (bounded JSON, validated schema, no path trust) + attach only when `kernel_run_id` is present and payload parses”.
